analysis.reasoning: Core message: Celebrates 70 years of China’s foreign aid and CIDCA’s 2nd anniversary, emphasizing global solidarity against COVID-19 and stating that China stands united with the world. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no mention of the West or criticism. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; highlights China’s foreign aid history, international development cooperation, solidarity, and standing with the world to overcome COVID-19—hallmarks of benevolence and cooperative multilateralism. CH3 (epic history): No; mentions an anniversary but not framed as overcoming adversity or historical resilience. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): No; focus is on international aid, not domestic system or governance values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No; does not tout domestic development achievements or successes; focuses on aid abroad. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): No. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
